name: Synthesis Yield Agent
description: Autonomous DeFi yield agent that scans lending protocols and Uniswap LP pools, allocates capital for optimal risk-adjusted yield, and manages positions on Base mainnet. AI-powered swap reasoning, ZK privacy integration, circuit breakers, and full audit trail.

erc8004_registrations.label: Yield Agent
erc8004_registrations.purpose: Autonomous yield optimization across Aave, Morpho, Compound, and Uniswap LP

supported_tools.name: aave_v3
supported_tools.description: Lending protocol — supply USDC for yield on Base mainnet

supported_tools.name: morpho_blue
supported_tools.description: Lending protocol — optimized USDC yield on Base mainnet

supported_tools.name: compound_v3
supported_tools.description: Lending protocol — USDC yield on Base mainnet

supported_tools.name: uniswap_v3_swap
supported_tools.description: Token swaps via Uniswap Trading API (Base mainnet)

supported_tools.name: claude_llm
supported_tools.description: Claude Haiku 4.5 for swap reasoning — analyzes yields, balances, gas, and recommends optimal action

supported_tools.name: defillama_api
supported_tools.description: DeFi Llama yields API — cross-protocol yield rates and TVL data

supported_tools.name: chainlink_oracle
supported_tools.description: Chainlink ETH/USD price feed on Base — on-chain price data, no external API

supported_tools.name: aerodrome_monitor
supported_tools.description: Aerodrome AMM pool monitoring on Base — read-only yield tracking via DeFi Llama

supported_tools.name: base_rpc
supported_tools.description: Base L2 mainnet RPC — on-chain reads, gas estimation, transaction broadcast

supported_tools.name: sqlite_database
supported_tools.description: Local SQLite for execution history, portfolio state, audit trail

supported_tools.name: lido_steth_treasury
supported_tools.description: stETH Agent Treasury on Ethereum mainnet — yield-bearing operating budget backed by Lido staking. Agent can only withdraw accrued yield, never principal.

steps: SCAN: Fetch yield rates from Aave V3, Morpho Blue, Compound V3 via DeFi Llama + on-chain validation
VALIDATE: Cross-validate rates across 3 data sources, reject anomalies (>2x median)
MONITOR: Check circuit breakers (USDC depeg, TVL crash, gas freeze, rate divergence)
ASSESS: Score protocols by risk-adjusted yield (APY, TVL, utilization, chain risk)
ALLOCATE: Compute optimal capital allocation across eligible protocols
REBALANCE: Detect rate shifts, trigger rebalancing if sustained differential > threshold
EXECUTE: Deposit/withdraw USDC to highest-yield protocols (paper or live mode)
ACCRUE: Track yield accrual on existing positions, update portfolio state
PERSIST: Save execution records, portfolio snapshots, and audit trail to SQLite
self_correction: Rate divergence detection: if on-chain rate differs from API by >2x, use on-chain as truth
Depeg monitor: if USDC depegs >2%, emergency withdraw all positions
Gas freeze: if gas exceeds ceiling, pause execution until normalized
Rebalance tracker: sustained rate differential over N hours triggers capital reallocation
Fail-closed AI: if Claude swap recommendation fails, fall back to rule-based logic
